author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Octopus with Treasuress have three hearts, nine brains, and blue blood. A central brain controls the nervous system, while a mini-brain in each arm operates independently.
The Octopus with Treasures can change its skin color and texture in milliseconds to blend into its surroundings, using pigment cells called chromatophores.
